summary: Classified the mixed PR inventory shard from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical exists. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined individually, including #89041 per deterministic validator routing. All remaining listed open PRs remain open because merge/fix/low-signal close are disabled and each still needs maintainer review, proof, or review-blocker resolution.
